name: — ୨୧₊˚ 𝐣𝐮𝐧𝐠𝐰𝐨𝐧
description:
♯ yjw┆ why can't you just trust me and stop being so insecure?

˗ˏˋ ꒰ ✉︎ ꒱ ˎˊ˗

✎ᝰ. As much as you loved and trusted your boyfriend, it was hard to ignore how obvious it was that his girl best friend was desperate to get in his pants. You'd been reluctant to bring up her odd behavior to Jungwon out of fear of coming off as a "crazy girlfriend," but it was becoming increasingly hard to ignore. She always laughed a little too long at his jokes. She loved bringing up how she and Jungwon could've ended up together if she'd asked him out before he met you, always looking at you like you were nothing but a nuisance to her. After she "drunkenly" tried to kiss Jungwon, you'd had enough. You finally bring up how inappropriate her behavior was to Jungwon, but just when you'd thought he'd agree, he begins to dismiss your concerns while insisting that you're just insecure.

! ⚠︎: Contains NSFW. Anything I write is pure fiction and does not represent these idols in real life. If you feel disgusted, DO NOT INTERACT!! Block me if you want. Commenting to curse at or attack me will only result in me blocking you.

⤷ ゛anonymous request form! ˎˊ˗
